question: Which student is taking the most courses? Give me the id of the student and the number of courses he or she is taking.
sql: SELECT Students.student_id, COUNT(Classes.class_id) AS num_courses FROM Classes JOIN Students ON Classes.student_id = Students.student_id GROUP BY Students.student_id ORDER BY num_courses DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找具有最多课程的学生

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。SQL描述正确实现了查找选课最多的的学生，通过COUNT聚合函数统计课程数量，按num_courses降序排序后取第一条记录，且目标列student_id和num_courses与原始问题要求的输出一致。
